memoryArtifacts.headline: Garrejade
memoryArtifacts.description:
The Life Summary of Garrejade

Garrejade de Marseilles END was born from about 1070 to 1085, in Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France. She married Pons IV de FOS de Peinier V …

zh.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseille是Pons Ier DE LUNEL和Roscie INCONNUE的女兒，於從大約1070年到1085年出生在法國普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o馬爾爾。她和Pons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselha至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1103年在法國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseille是Pons Ier DE LUNEL和Roscie INCONNUE的女儿，于从大约1070年到1085年出生在法国普洛福-阿爾培-o特 達阿爾布-度-o馬爾爾。她和Pons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselha至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1103年在法国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marseille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (southern): habitational name from Marseille, the largest city of Provence and the second-largest city of France. This surname is most common in Haiti, where it may be a nickname (see 3 below).
French (northern): habitational name from Marseille-en-Beauvaisis (Oise).
Haitian: probably a nickname from the name of the French city of Marseille, referring to La Marseillaise, the national anthem of France (adopted in 1795).

nameMeanings.name: Pons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Pedro, Ramon, Guillermo, Roberto, Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Mario, Rafael, Apolonia.  French Adrien, Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Marcelle, Matilde.
Catalan, French (Occitan), and Dutch: from the medieval personal name Pons (see Ponce ).
German: patronymic from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name, such as Bonhard, formed with the element bon ‘request, petition’ (compare Latin bonus).

variants.name: Ponce
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Carlos, Francisco, Jorge, Miguel, Pedro, Raul, Roberto.

Spanish and French: from the medieval personal name Ponce, ultimately from Pontius, a Roman surname, perhaps an ethnic name for someone from Pontus (named from Greek pontos ‘ocean’) in Asia Minor, or an Italic cognate of Latin Quintus ‘fifth’ (i.e. ‘fifth-born’). The name was borne by two 3rd-century Christian saints, a Carthaginian deacon and a martyr of Nice, but was not widely popular in the Middle Ages because of the inhibiting influence of the even more famous Pontius Pilate. In some cases though, the surname may have been originally used for someone who had played the part of this character in a religious play.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseille was born from about 1070 to 1085, in Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France as the daughter of Pons Ier DE LUNEL and Roscie INCONNUE. She had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Pons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselha. She died in 1103, in France.

fr.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseille est née du environ 1070 au 1085, à Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, France, fille de Pons Ier DE LUNEL et Roscie INCONNUE. Elle a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Pons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselha. Elle est décédée en 1103, à France.

de.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseille wurde von um 1070 bis 1085 in Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Frankreich, als Tochter von Pons Ier DE LUNEL und Roscie INCONNUE geboren. Sie hatte mit Pons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselha mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1103 in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseille è nata il da circa 1070 a 1085 nel Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, Francia come figlia di Pons Ier DE LUNEL e Roscie INCONNUE. Lei avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Pons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselha. Morì nel 1103, nel Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseilleはから約1070年まで1085年にフランスプローベンセ-アルペス-クoト ド'アズルボウチェス-ドウ-ルhoンマーセイルでPons Ier DE LUNELとRoscie INCONNUEの娘として生まれた。彼女はPons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselhaとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1103年にフランスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseille(은)는 대략 1070년 부터 1085년 까지 프랑스 프로븐스-알페스-co트 드'아저 부체스-드-ho니 마세이에서 Pons Ier DE LUNEL(와)과 Roscie INCONNUE의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Pons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselha(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1103년 프랑스에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseille nasceu de aproximadamente 1070 a 1085, em Marseille, Bouches-du-Rhône, Provence-Alpes-Côte d'Azur, França filha de Pons Ier DE LUNEL e Roscie INCONNUE. Ela teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Pons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselha. Ela faleceu em 1103, em França.

ru.lifeSummary: Garrejade Pons III de Peynier de Marseille родилась с около 1070 по 1085 в местности марсилл, боучес-ду-рoн, провенсе-алпес-кoт д'азур, Франция. Её родителей звали Pons Ier DE LUNEL и Roscie INCONNUE. У неё было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Pons IV de FOS de Peynier VIscomte de Marselha. Она умерла в 1103 г. в местности Франция.
